column1: Kyle Stowers leads the charge for Beat The Streak players tonight, stepping into the leadoff spot on the road with a strong 70.9% hit probability and a clear platoon advantage against Zack Littell. That top-of-the-order role, paired with a favorable park factor, makes his steady lefty bat a prime pick to keep streaks alive. Right behind him, Joey Loperfido offers nearly identical upside, batting fifth with his own platoon edge and a reliable contact profile—don’t overlook his knack for finding base hits in key spots. Xavier Edwards also brings a solid shot near the top of the lineup, while Brendan Donovan and Josh Naylor round out the list with lefty-on-righty matchups worth a quick glance. Tonight’s slate is loaded with strong, reliable options to anchor any streak.
